invariants.name: memory_blocking
notes: Current deterministic tests pass for degraded memory fail-closed behavior.
Current live brain health and brain status both report model-facing memory as blocked while Postgres-backed memory is unavailable.

invariants.name: planning_memory_blocking
invariants.blocking_reason: The degraded-state artifact attributes plan and execute-plan blocking to model_facing_memory, but the authoritative CLI surfaces currently block those workflows as planning_server_unavailable. Same-area planning-path truth is therefore not aligned across machine-readable and CLI-authoritative surfaces.
notes: This is the clearest same-area truth split currently blocking Phase 75 closure.
80.1-B must normalize planning-path truth so degraded-memory closure does not depend on conflicting subsystem attribution.

invariants.name: degraded_state_signaling
notes: Degraded state is explicit, machine-readable, and visible on both operator surfaces.
The remaining issue is not silent degradation; it is closure semantics and subsystem-attribution mismatch.

invariants.name: drift_input_validity
invariants.blocking_reason: Phase 75 truth currently consumes stale drift and reconciliation inputs. Current health output reports drift_truth_stale and reconciliation_truth_stale, and the regenerated phase truth keeps verify-path workflow blocks for drift truth unresolved.
notes: This is in scope only because Phase 75 truth currently includes drift truth in final closure for the same enforcement area.
80.1-B should repair this minimally: freshness, presence, and machine-readable validity only.

invariants.name: verification_integrity
invariants.blocking_reason: The verification artifact remains CONDITIONAL and cites mixed runtime-posture reasoning rather than converged same-area invariant closure. Requirement truth therefore still cannot close without manual interpretation.
notes: Verification integrity is not a contract-shape problem; the artifact validates structurally.
The failure is that the same enforcement area still resolves to CONDITIONAL instead of a mechanically justified VALID outcome.
